p.seg: Richard by the grace of God humble servant of the church of the blessed Andrew, to all sons of Holy Mother Church, Greeting:

Let those to come as well as those present know that we have granted and by the defence of this document made firm to God and to the canons serving God at Edinburgh now and in the future, the church of Kinneil with all things rightfully belonging to it, to be held in free and perpetual alms. Wherefore I will and command by episcopal authority that the aforesaid canons should hold and possess that church as freely, quietly and honourably as they hold and possess any church in the whole of our diocese. Reserving the episcopal dues.

With these witnesses, Andrew archdeacon of Lothian, Walter, archdeacon of St Andrews, Ilbert prior of Haddington, Roger prior of Loch Leven, Robert clerk of Perth, Alexander and William the bishop’s chaplains, Geoffrey the steward, Master Abraham, Odo the steward, Hugh the butler.
